name: gitnexus-cli
tagline: Wraps the GitNexus CLI to analyze/index a repo, check status, clean the index, and generate a wiki.
verdict: Well-documented CLI wrapper with strong failure-path and troubleshooting coverage, sensible defaults, and disclosed side effects (API key stored locally, gist publish is opt-in). Minor risk: fallback install/run commands use unpinned `gitnexus@latest`, and the skill carries no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: Fallback commands use unpinned `gitnexus@latest` (`npm i -g gitnexus`, `pnpm dlx gitnexus@latest analyze`) instead of a pinned version.
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
